(Translated by Google)
The service is very bad inside the premises

reviews.comment:
Había una cola tremenda de autos pero así todo, fue muy rápida la atención. Muy buen servicio y amabilidad de los playeros y la caja.

(Translated by Google)
There was a huge line of cars, but even so, service was very quick. The service was excellent, and the staff and cashier were very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvejVXTXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lento, muy lento. Cuando por llegas al surtidor,la atención es muy buena

(Translated by Google)
Slow, very slow. When you finally get to the pump, the service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvejRXNDhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fila que se supo disminuir por la atención rápida y la cantidad de surtidores. Los baños increíblemente limpios. Hasta había papel

(Translated by Google)
The line was shortened thanks to the quick service and the number of pumps. The restrooms were incredibly clean. There was even toilet paper.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvajUtcFJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.
No tienen repuestos (necesitaba una lamparita para Fiat)
Mucha espera para cargar por ser finde largo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.
They don't have spare parts (I needed a light bulb for my Fiat). Long wait times to refuel because it was a long weekend.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvajdiVEd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Cargué y se prendió la luz del catalizador en el tablero. Recargue despues  en Shell y se apago. (Vento)

(Translated by Google)
I filled up and the catalytic converter light came on in the dashboard. I refueled at Shell and it went off. (Vento)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdDV6bm9RRRAB
